architecture.title: Architecture for: Нужен портал тикетов для банков-клиентов, до 100к обращений в месяц, с подтвержд
architecture.description: Нужен портал тикетов для банков-клиентов, до 100к обращений в месяц, с подтверждением по SMS. SBOM и CVE, CVSS>=7. RPS 500, пик 2000, задержка до 3 сек. REST webhook. Со счёта на счёт интеграция. Автоотмена через 10 минут.

components.name: API Gateway
components.description: Single entry point handling REST webhooks, rate limiting (RPS 500/2000), and routing to internal services.

components.name: Ticket Orchestrator
components.description: Central coordinator managing ticket lifecycle, SLA tracking, and delegating tasks to reused agents.

components.name: Bank Client Ticketing Hub
components.description: Reused agent for ticket ingestion, SLA tracking, escalation workflows, and SMS confirmations.

components.name: Supply Chain Security Scanner
components.description: Reused agent for SBOM validation, CVE scanning, and vulnerability assessment (CVSS>=7).

components.name: Event Queue
components.description: Message broker for async processing of webhooks, SMS jobs, and security scans to handle peak loads.

components.name: Ticket Database
components.description: Persistent storage for tickets, user sessions, and transaction logs with 7-year retention.

components.name: Session Cache
components.description: High-speed cache for session state and rate limiting checks to ensure low latency.

components.name: SMS Gateway
components.description: External integration for sending and receiving SMS confirmations for ticket creation.

components.name: Payment Integration
components.description: External integration for account-to-account transfers and handling auto-cancellation logic.

components.name: Monitoring Stack
components.description: Observability components for SLA alerting, metrics collection, and audit logging.

data_flows.label: Incoming REST webhooks (ticket creation) with rate limiting
Rate limiting checks and session state validation
Async ticket ingestion, SLA tracking, and escalation workflow processing
Dependency audit, SBOM validation, and vulnerability scan (CVSS>=7) for new tickets
SMS confirmation request for ticket creation
Persist ticket data, user sessions, and transaction logs
Store SBOM, CVE, and vulnerability scan results
Account-to-account transfer request and auto-cancellation trigger (10 min timeout)
Payment status updates and cancellation confirmation events
Metrics, logs, and SLA alerting data
